column1: # Tab-separated. One rule per line. Trailing comment is for humans.
# IGNORE = rule does not run; WARN = report but pass; FAIL = report and fail.
# Defaults are sensible. Add suppressions here only with a written reason —
# silencing security findings without justification is the canonical anti-pattern.

column3: (CSP) Public JSON API — CSP not applicable
(X-Frame-Options) Reverse-proxy adds it; suppress here, gate at CDN
(Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens) Read-only API — no state-changing forms
